nasb.text: And so, because he was a prophet and knew that God had sworn to him with an oath to seat  one  of his descendants on his throne,

esv.text: Being therefore a prophet, and knowing that God had sworn with an oath to him that he would set one of his descendants on his throne,

cnv.text: 他是先知，既然知道　神向他起過誓，要從他的後裔中立一位，坐在他的寶座上，

ccb.text: 大卫是先知，知道上帝曾起誓要从他的后裔中选立一人继承他的王位。

csbs.text: 既然大卫是先知，也知道神曾向他起誓说，要从他的后裔中兴起一位坐在他的宝座上，
